context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Need state triggered when food bowl is empty (food_level = 0)
context.screen_position: Center at x=64px, y=60px, head oriented toward food bowl
adjacent_elements: cage_food_bowl (empty, at x=16px, y=100px - Echo looks toward this)
speech_bubble (appears at x=80-92px, y=40-50px with seed icon inside)
context.usage_scenario: Triggered when food bowl becomes empty. Echo looks toward empty food bowl with longing. Speech bubble with seed icon appears to communicate need. Player must tap feed button to provide seeds and transition Echo back to idle.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel standing upright but head turned and tilted toward food bowl location (lower left). Crest in neutral position. Body language shows anticipation/longing.

animation.description: Frame 1: Head turned toward food bowl, looking down-left. Frame 2: Head tilts slightly more. Frame 3: Head returns to frame 1 position. Frame 4: Brief glance forward then back to food bowl. Gentle looping animation showing Echo checking food bowl repeatedly.

visual_specification.details: Head rotated approximately 30-40 degrees toward food bowl (left side). Eyes looking toward lower left (food bowl direction). Crest at 3-5px normal height. Speech bubble (12x10px, #FFF1E8 background, #1D2B53 outline) appears to right of Echo with seed icon (3x3px, #FFA300) inside. Body remains upright on perch.

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette and base structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: Unlike idle: head oriented toward food bowl, speech bubble present. Unlike eating: not leaning down, bowl is empty. Unlike dirty: no hunched posture, different need being communicated.

explicit_negations: No outline stroke on Echo body
